ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the domain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the domain was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the domain (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., BUSINESS, REQUEST) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error code */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the error code belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the error code belongs to */,
  "code" INTEGER /* The actual error code */,
  "nature" TEXT /* Nature of the error (e.g., WARNING, ERROR) */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning of the error code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error code was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the error code (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  "suggested_action" TEXT /* Suggested action to resolve the error */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH) */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to resolve the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_codes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_codes_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error occurrence */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error code that occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the error occurrence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurrence was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurrence was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the error occurrence (e.g., OPEN, RESOLVED) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_occurrences_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_occurrences_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES error_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., DEVELOPER, ADMIN) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error occurrence that triggered the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the error report (e.g., PENDING, COMPLETED) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the report (e.g., LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH) */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_reports_occurrence_id FOREIGN KEY ("occurrence_id") REFERENCES error_occurrences ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
